description: 1. If the fibula is from the right leg, tick the "Right side leg" checkbox.

ui_guidance.title: Is the fibula from the right leg?
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose one option.

choice_descriptor.question: Is the fibula from the right leg?

ui_guidance.title: Is the fibula from the right leg?
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose one option.

description: 2. In the "Select mandibular segmentation" section, choose the mandibular segmentation.

ui_guidance.title: Select the mandibular segmentation node from the scene.
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter choice.

choice_descriptor.question: Select the mandibular segmentation node from the scene.

ui_guidance.title: Select the mandibular segmentation node from the scene.
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter choice.

description: 3. In the "Select fibula segmentation" section, choose the fibula segmentation.

ui_guidance.title: Select the fibula segmentation node from the scene.
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter choice.

choice_descriptor.question: Select the fibula segmentation node from the scene.

ui_guidance.title: Select the fibula segmentation node from the scene.
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter choice.

description: 4. For the "Current Scalar Volume" option, select the Mandible Volume.

ui_guidance.title: Select the volume node that corresponds to the mandible (Mandible Volume).
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter choice.

choice_descriptor.question: Select the volume node that corresponds to the mandible (Mandible Volume).

ui_guidance.title: Select the volume node that corresponds to the mandible (Mandible Volume).
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter choice.

description: 5. Click "Create bone models from segmentations" button.
6. Change the layout to "Conventional".
7. For the R (red) view, toggle on "slice visibility in 3D view".

operation_descriptions: Toggle on slice visibility in 3D view for the Red slice view.

sub_operations.description: Toggle on slice visibility in 3D view for the Red slice view.

description: 8. For the R (red) view, toggle on "FOV, Spacing match 2D" (adjusts slice resolution to match the 2D viewport pixel spacing).

operation_descriptions: Toggle on FOV/Spacing match 2D for the Red slice view.

sub_operations.description: Toggle on FOV/Spacing match 2D for the Red slice view.

description: 9. In the toolbar, turn on "slice intersection visibility". In the slice intersection interaction options, turn on "set interaction", then enable both "Translate" and "Rotate".

ui_guidance.title: Enable slice intersection interaction
ui_guidance.instruction: Turn on slice intersection visibility, enable set interaction, then enable both Translate and Rotate.

operation_descriptions: Turn on slice intersection visibility and enable set interaction with Translate and Rotate.

sub_operations.description: Turn on slice intersection visibility and enable set interaction with Translate and Rotate.

description: 10. Manually adjust the slice intersection position by translate and rotate of the cross lines in each view.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust slice intersection
ui_guidance.instruction: Translate and rotate the cross lines in each 2D view to set the slice intersection at the desired location.

interaction_descriptor.placement_instructions: Translate and rotate the cross lines in each 2D view to set the slice intersection at the desired location.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust slice intersection
ui_guidance.instruction: Translate and rotate the cross lines in each 2D view to set the slice intersection at the desired location.

description: 11. Click the "Add mandibular curve" button.

sub_operations.description: Add mandibular curve by clicking the button.

description: 12. Configure the display settings of the mandibular curve created by the "Add mandibular curve" button so it is shown in both "View 1" and "Red".

ui_guidance.title: Configure mandibular curve display
ui_guidance.instruction: Make the mandibular curve visible in both View 1 and Red views.

operation_descriptions: Configure display settings of the mandibular curve node to show it in both 'View 1' and 'Red' views.

sub_operations.description: Configure display settings of the mandibular curve node to show it in both 'View 1' and 'Red' views.

description: 13. Manually click and draw on the "Red" view to create a curve along the mandible.

ui_guidance.title: Draw mandibular curve
ui_guidance.instruction: Draw the curve, then click Done.

interaction_descriptor.placement_instructions: Click points along the mandible in the Red 2D view to create a curve. The curve should follow the mandibular shape.

ui_guidance.title: Draw mandibular curve
ui_guidance.instruction: Draw the curve, then click Done.

description: 14. Change the layout to "BoneReconstructionPlanner".
15. For the R (red) view, toggle off "slice visibility in 3D view".

operation_descriptions: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D view for the Red slice view.

sub_operations.description: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D view for the Red slice view.

description: 16. Manually set how many cut planes you want.

ui_guidance.title: How many cut planes do you want?
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter number of cutting planes.

choice_descriptor.question: How many cut planes do you want?

ui_guidance.title: How many cut planes do you want?
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter number of cutting planes.

description: 17. Click "Add cut plane" button.

sub_operations.description: Click 'Add cut plane' button to create a new mandibular cut plane.

description:
18. Place one mandibular cut plane using the extension's Add cut plane workflow. If the user requested N cut planes, repeat the Add cut plane + place plane
  interaction N times. Do not store these planes as a rotation plane; they are mandibular cut planes managed by the extension.

ui_guidance.title: Place cutting plane
ui_guidance.instruction: Place this cutting plane, then click Done.

interaction_descriptor.placement_instructions: Place this plane, then click Done.

ui_guidance.title: Place cutting plane
ui_guidance.instruction: Place this cutting plane, then click Done.

description: 19. Click "Add fibula line" button.

sub_operations.description: Click 'Add fibula line' button to create a new fibula line.

description: 20. Draw a line over the fibula in "3D View 2", starting with the first point distally and the last point proximally.

ui_guidance.title: Draw fibula line
ui_guidance.instruction: Place this line, then click Done.

interaction_descriptor.placement_instructions: Place the first point at the distal end of the fibula and the second point at the proximal end in the 3D View 2.

ui_guidance.title: Draw fibula line
ui_guidance.instruction: Place this line, then click Done.

description: 21. Click "Center fibula line using fibula model" button to align the line with the anatomical axis of the fibula.

sub_operations.description: Click 'Center fibula line using fibula model' button.

description: 22. Click "Update fibula planes over fibula line; update fibula bone pieces and transform them to mandible" to generate the reconstruction and create the fibula cut planes.

sub_operations.description: Update fibula planes, bone pieces, and transform them to mandible.
